source.documentTitle: Environmental Product Declaration 40 MPa High Performance Concrete

product.name: 40 MPa High Performance Concrete
product.description: This high performance concrete will be used for a variety of applications including foundations, slab on ground, and suspended slab. This concrete is produced in accordance with AS 1379-2007 Specification and supply of concrete. This concrete is produced with strength class of S40. It is designed for high performance in varied special engineering applications.
